headlines.title: BODY AND SPIRIT CONNECTION FOUND
headlines.subtitle: Scientist Discovers That the Soul of Man Is Tied to His Body by Fear Alone and Courage Will Free It. DRIFTS FOR MANY DAYS IN OPEN BOAT AT SEA Daughter of General in U. S. Army Picked Up Off Coast of China; Actress Marries Member of the Nobility.

headlines.subtitle: Several Villages Inundated and Much Damage Is Caused to Property: No Report of Loss of Life.

advertisements.description: Men's Department with modern conveniences, revolving wardrobes, and a wide selection of clothing, hats, shirts, and more. Located at Twelfth and Main.
Made of pure silk in the newest patterns, white grounds with heavy stripes of blue, lavender, red and green; no better value to be had for $3.50. Your initial worked on the shirt for 25c.

Our attractive collection of Men's Suits includes a model for every man. The tailoring and workmanship are of the highest order and the materials were selected to give style, appearance and wear. The materials are blue serge and cheviots and worsteds in a good range of grays, blues, tans and other popular shades for summer wear, in solid colors, stripes, checks and tanton plaids.

A shirt with the tail made into drawers: does away with unnecessary shirt tail and prevents shirt from pulling out; made of madras, percale and silk pongee in patterns you will like; each, $1.50, $2.00, $2.50 and $3.00.
